description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the fedora Docker image with two stages: build and test. In the build stage add a job named pok3rconf:linux that runs a before_script to install gcc, gcc-c++, cmake, make, openssl-devel, libusb-devel, qt5-qtbase-devel and qt5-qtquickcontrols2-devel via dnf, then executes mkdir build, cd build, cmake -D CMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=\"Release\" .., and make; it sets GIT_SUBMODULE_STRATEGY to recursive, and publishes artifacts named $CI_JOB_NAME-$CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG containing build/pok3rconf, build/pok3rtool/pok3rtool, build/pok3rtool/libpok3rlib.so, build/pok3rtool/rawhid/librawhid.so, and build/pok3rtool/libchaos/chaos/libchaos.so. In the test stage add a job named test:linux that depends on pok3rconf:linux, runs a before_script installing libstdc++, openssl, libusb, qt5-qtbase and qt5-qtquickcontrols2 via dnf, sets GIT_STRATEGY to none, and runs cd build/pok3rtool followed by ./pok3rtool list. Both jobs are tagged with linux.
